post.title: Navigating the Shift from Deterministic to Probabilistic Software Engineering
post.description: As we advance into the era of AI agents, we're witnessing a fundamental shift toward probabilistic thinking that's changing what it means to be a software engineer.
post.excerpt: Software engineering is at a crossroads. For decades, the craft has been built on deterministic foundations – where 2+2 always equals 4 and…
